en_title: GTA 6 Story Features Distinct 'Chapters' — Could Red Dead Redemption 2 Hold the Clue to How It Works?
cn_title: 《GTA6》故事确认分章节，《荒野大镖客：救赎2》模式引猜想
subtitle: 分章节似RDR2？
opus_summary: Rockstar官网确认《GTA6》故事将分章节，售价100美元(约合人民币681元)的终极版物品随章节解锁。粉丝猜测结构类似《荒野大镖客：救赎2》，可能有时间跳跃与地图变化，但玩家有望保留安全屋。细节尚待公布。

paragraphs.en: GTA fans are discussing how the story in Grand Theft Auto 6 will be structured, following the apparent confirmation that it will be separated into chapters, similar to .
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA》粉丝们正在讨论《GTA6》的故事结构将如何安排，此前已确认游戏将分为多个章节，类似于。

paragraphs.en: An official reference to content becoming unlocked through various chapters of the game can be seen on Rockstar's website, where the developer discusses its various bonuses available in GTA 6's $100 Ultimate Edition. These bonuses will not all be available straight away, Rockstar has cautioned, noting instead that the extras "are threaded across all aspects of Jason and Lucia's story, with new items uncovered behind each chapter."
paragraphs.cn: 在 Rockstar 的官网上，可以看到官方提到游戏内容将通过不同章节解锁，该网站讨论了《GTA6》100美元(约合人民币681元)终极版中的各种奖励。Rockstar 提醒，这些奖励并非全部立即开放，并指出额外内容「贯穿于杰森和露西亚故事的方方面面，新道具在每个章节背后解锁」。

paragraphs.en: Various cars, safe houses, sidequests and guns can be accessed as fans play through GTA 6 — and it sounds as if the game will feature a chapter-based structure. Exactly how this will work — whether the game's world will open up slowly over time, and feature Red Dead Redemption 2-style time jumps — remains to be seen, though fans have already begun speculating.
paragraphs.cn: 随着粉丝们游玩《GTA6》，各种车辆、安全屋、支线任务和枪支都可以解锁——听起来游戏将采用章节式结构。具体如何运作——游戏世界是否会随着时间推移逐渐开放，是否会有类似《荒野大镖客：救赎2》的时间跳跃——还有待观察，不过粉丝们已经开始猜测了。

paragraphs.en: "Chapters like RDR2 could allow time jumps or bigger changes to the map," wrote GTA fan VimDim, in a reddit thread discussing the matter.
paragraphs.cn: 「像《荒野大镖客：救赎2》那样的章节可以允许时间跳跃或地图更大变化，」《GTA》粉丝 VimDim 在 Reddit 上讨论此事时写道。

paragraphs.en: "In RDR 2 these chapters were based in different locations of the map," noted SquashTurbulent5309, "so GTA 6 story might be the same."
paragraphs.cn: 「在《荒野大镖客：救赎2》中，这些章节基于地图的不同地点，」SquashTurbulent5309 指出，「所以《GTA6》的故事可能也是如此。」

paragraphs.en: "The story will be divided into chapters with each one probably mostly featuring a different part of the map and different vibes in terms of mood and overall tone," suggested Any_Objecct_5151. "It doesn't mean you can't go explore other places or anything though."
paragraphs.cn: 「故事将被分成章节，每一章可能主要集中在不同的地图区域，并在情绪和整体基调上呈现出不同的氛围，」Any_Objecct_5151 推测道。「但这并不意味着你不能去探索其他地方。」

paragraphs.en: That said, this is a GTA game rather than one set on the frontier. It seems unlikely that players will lose access to properties or cars acquired earlier in the game as the action moves from location to location, even if the current action is now centered elsewhere.
paragraphs.cn: 话虽如此，这毕竟是一款《GTA》而不是西部题材的游戏。即便当前的情节重心转移到别处，玩家在游戏早期获得的房产或载具似乎也不太会随着场景切换而无法使用。

paragraphs.en: "Hopefully we keep the safehouses for the entire game instead of having only one per chapter like in RDR2," wrote llambordins. Replied aneuryst: "Probably will, we only had one per chapter in RDR2 cause it was a camp that moved. I'm sure apartments/houses in this won't move."
paragraphs.cn: 「希望安全屋能贯穿整个游戏，而不是像《荒野大镖客：救赎2》那样每章只有一个，」llambordins 写道。aneuryst 回复说：「大概会的，RDR2 每章只有一个安全屋是因为营地要迁移。我猜本作的公寓/房屋不会搬来搬去。」

paragraphs.en: Need to catch up on all of today's GTA 6 news? Rockstar has now announced GTA 6's price and also a pricier $100 Ultimate Edition , released 63 new GTA 6 screenshots , and confirmed that physical editions of the game won't include a disc in the box .
paragraphs.cn: 需要回顾今天所有《GTA6》新闻吗？Rockstar 现已公布《GTA6》的售价，以及售价更高的 100美元(约合人民币681元)的终极版，同时发布了 63 张全新《GTA6》截图，并确认实体版游戏包装内不含光盘。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips 是 IGN 新闻编辑。

manual_approved_issues.detail: source contains 'Grand Theft Auto', but required dictionary translation '侠盗猎车手' is missing
